issues.description: Text says 'during this turn' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'

Second trigger object with type 'Trigger' is undefined/unclear. The DSL describes a single OnPlay effect with two sequential actions; there should not be a separate 'Trigger' entry without clarification of what triggers it
Action should specify 'up to 1' via maxTargets:1 or similar constraint for clarity
